since_last: 86% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.54%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 86% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.66% · Gold -1.20% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 86% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.54%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.54%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.59%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +8.21%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.21%, CEVA +7.88%, ARM +4.56%, AMAT +4.31%, LRCX +4.04%. Laggards: BABA -0.87%, DV -0.68%, AES -0.41%, ROK -0.33%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.44% at $192.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
